title: HELEN_HANDOFF_V1
description: Non-sovereign handoff from ORACLE SUPER 2: BUILDERS to HELEN/ORACLE kernel. A handoff, not a verdict.

source_system.description: Must always be ORACLE_SUPER_2_BUILDERS to prevent source spoofing.

run_id.description: The BUILDERS_RUN_V1 this handoff comes from.

brief_id.description: The BUILDERS_BRIEF_V1 that initiated the run.

final_artifact_ref.description: Relative path to final_artifact.md or .json. Null if run aborted.

abort_report_ref.description: Relative path to abort_report.json. Null if run delivered successfully.

source_refs.description: Source identifiers cited during the run.

evidence_refs.description: Evidence bundle identifiers used during the run.

open_risks.description: Known weaknesses, unresolved tensions, or incomplete evidence in the artifact. HELEN uses these during admissibility evaluation.

non_sovereign_attestation.description: BUILDERS asserts it did NOT emit sovereign decisions. HELEN verifies this before admissibility evaluation.

verdict_emitted.description: MUST be false. Any true value causes immediate HELEN rejection.

truth_claimed.description: MUST be false. BUILDERS does not self-attest truth.

doctrine_mutated.description: MUST be false. BUILDERS cannot mutate kernel doctrine.

x-law: This object is a handoff, not a verdict. HELEN must reject any handoff where non_sovereign_attestation contains true values or where forbidden fields appear. HELEN decides admissibility; BUILDERS hands off artifacts.
